testcase.name: Supabase Client > should provide verbose info about credentials and client status
testcase.system-out:
[Supabase Test] SUPABASE_URL: https://oflctqligzouzshimuqh.supabase.co [Supabase Test] SUPABASE_KEY: eyJhbG... [Supabase Test] Client available: [33mtrue[39m [Supabase Test] Client methods verified
[Supabase Test] Auth check completed (expected: no user logged in) [Supabase Test] Attempting table query...
